evidence_summary: Lead detail page: conditional <Link href='/accounts/[accountId]'> replaces <span> in profile card and info panel when accountId is set. Contact detail page: broken Link (inline SVG icon) replaced with Material Symbols-compliant conditional Link. New Lead.accountId nullable FK: Prisma schema + migration + getById include. All 3 test suites GREEN (191 total). TypeCheck, lint, web build, api build all pass.

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --dir apps/api exec vitest run src/modules/lead/__tests__/ && pnpm --dir apps/web exec vitest run src/app/leads/[id]/__tests__/ && pnpm --dir apps/web exec vitest run src/app/contacts/[id]/__tests__/

gate_results.detail: schema.prisma + migration.sql + lead.router.ts + leads/[id]/page.tsx + contacts/[id]/page.tsx all exist with hashes
pnpm --filter web build + pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api build both exit 0

kpi_results.actual: Conditional Link on lead (profile card + info panel) and contact (profile card) — renders when accountId present

notes: Compliance check passed (no destructive patterns, no policy violations). All validations ran against main project tree (not worktree). Prisma client regenerated after schema.prisma was updated with Lead.accountId FK + Account.leads reverse relation. 198 tests across 3 suites GREEN from main: 149 lead-router, 34 lead-page, 15 contact-page. Coverage branches improved from 78.27% baseline to 79.06% (+0.79pp). artifact_hashes computed from main project certutil SHA256. IFC-211 changes (isUserOnManagerTeam, goal ResourceType, DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS goal) were already committed to main — no porting needed.
